S.FORM: George Alvarez cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ɣeorɣe al*arez ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
